items.q: Name the movie that features the character Jake Sully.
items.explanation: Jake Sully is strongly linked to Avatar.

items.q: Which movie features the character Simba?
items.explanation: Simba is associated with The Lion King.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Forrest Gump?
items.explanation: Forrest Gump is one of the defining characters in Forrest Gump.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Elsa.
items.explanation: Elsa is strongly linked to Frozen.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Toy Story?
items.explanation: Woody is one of the defining characters in Toy Story.

items.q: The character Maximus appears in Doctor Strange.
items.explanation: Maximus appears in Gladiator, not Doctor Strange.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character T'Challa.
items.explanation: T'Challa is strongly linked to Black Panther.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Mr. Incredible.
items.explanation: Mr. Incredible is strongly linked to The Incredibles.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Men in Black?
items.explanation: Agent J is one of the defining characters in Men in Black.

items.q: The character Riley appears in Inside Out.
items.explanation: Riley is a key character in Inside Out.
